summary: Adjusted the opening to hand off more directly from chapter 9's manual-release return home, and tightened the closing fridge-list image so it feeds cleanly into chapter 11's opening.
edits: Reframed the opening around Nita unpacking the badge, token, and carbon copy after Leela is asleep to strengthen entry continuity from the prior chapter.
Changed the final image from a generic final page to the paper list under the smiling orange magnet to match the next chapter's pickup point.
